Financial Planning
Have confidence for the future with our holistic financial planning services, focused on your unique goals and supported by expert advice.
GET IN TOUCH
Financial planning is about more than just the numbers.
It’s about finding what matters to you and using your assets to live the life you want. Every plan is different. We can help you create the right financial plan that encompasses a full 360° view of your financial life.
Clear Goals and Direction
Turns out, a lot people aren’t great at finding the goals that matter to them. With the help of an advisor, you can find the deeper goals that you want to achieve. We’ll use these goals as a north star for your financial plan.
Finding the Right Amount
Retirement can be an exciting thing to work towards, but can also come with some anxieties. We’re here to make sure you have the right funding amount ready so you can enjoy retirement to the fullest.
Planning for Large Purchases
Your future plans might include buying a cottage or planning the ultimate luxury vacation. No matter what they might be, we can help include them in your long-term planning making sure you can enjoy today while saving for tomorrow.
Personalized Financial Planning
Your plan is unique and tailored to what matters to you. Through ups and downs, our advisors are here to help guide you through any moment and update your plan as life happens.
Are You Ready to Shape Your Financial Future?
Let’s get started today. Contact us to schedule your personal consultation and discover how we can help you achieve your financial goals.
BOOK A CALL WITH US
Financial Modeling
With so many different paths, it’s hard to chose one. That’s why we offer comprehensive financial modeling outlining a mass amount of different real world financial scenarios that might affect your financial plan.
Creating and Updating Financial Projections
Dynamic Retirement Spending Modelling
Custom Financial Calculators for Unique Circumstances
Estate & Legacy Planning
Ensure that your wealth is preserved, protected, and passed on according to your wishes. Our advisors understand the importance of securing a legacy that supports your loved ones and reflects your values. We’ll work together to make sure that happens.
Review and Update Estate Documents (Wills, Power of Attorney, Etc.)
Probate Planning
Tax-Efficient Transfer of Assets
Philanthropy & Charitable Giving
Risk Management
Every good plan has some protection. We’ll review your current situation and identify potential risks and come up with a plan on mitigating the impact they might post on your plan and loved ones.
Review Current Insurance Coverage
Assess Your Need for Different Insurances
Life
Disability
Critical Illness
Liability
Health & Travel
How Much Will You Need in Retirement?
Our retirement guide explores how to think about your lifestyle, current and future spending habits, the structure of government pensions, the often-misunderstood nature of inflation, and the famously debated “4% rule.”
DOWNLOAD THE GUIDE

Meet Our Team
Meet the team that is making an impact for Canadian investors. We’re here to help guide you with expert advice and dedicated service. Our mission is simple: to turn your financial goals into reality, with personalized strategies that fit your life.
MEET OUR TEAM
BECOME A CLIENT
Have Questions? We have the answers.
If you can’t find the answers to your questions here, reach out to us and we will be happy to get back to you.

`
Portfolio Management and brokerage services are offered by PWL Capital Inc. which is regulated by the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization (CIRO), and is a member of the Canadian Investor Protection Fund (CIPF).
Financial planning and insurance products are offered by PWL Advisors Inc. and are regulated in Ontario by Financial Services Regulatory Authority of Ontario (FSRA) and in Quebec by the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF). PWL Advisors Inc. is not a member of CIPF.
